Test Title: Unauthenticated user is redirected to /auth/login
Test Steps:
1. Ensure no user is logged in
2. Navigate to /dashboard
Expected Result: Browser redirects to /auth/login; dashboard content is not rendered

Test Title: Auth loading state renders centered ""Loading..."" text
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard while auth store is resolving
Expected Result: Centered text ""Loading..."" is shown at 80vh height while isLoading is true

Test Title: Dashboard layout renders a 2-column structure (sidebar + main)
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe page structure
Expected Result: 220px white sidebar on the left and a flex-1 bg content area on the right are rendered

Test Title: Sidebar displays the authenticated user's name and email
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe top of sidebar
Expected Result: User name (Syne bold) and email (small text3) are visible at the top of the sidebar

Test Title: Sidebar shows 4 navigation items: Overview / Chat History / Settings / Billing
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe sidebar nav items
Expected Result: Four nav links with icons and labels: 📊 Overview / 💬 Chat History / ⚙️ Settings / 💳 Billing

Test Title: Active sidebar item shows accent color bold weight and left border
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe the Overview nav item
Expected Result: Overview item has accent text color + bold font + 3px accent left border + accent-lt background

Test Title: Inactive sidebar items have muted text and no left border
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe non-active nav items
Expected Result: Chat History / Settings / Billing items show text2 color + no border + no background highlight

Test Title: Sidebar ""Overview"" link navigates to /dashboard
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/history
2. Click Overview in sidebar
Expected Result: Browser navigates to /dashboard; Overview item becomes active

Test Title: Sidebar ""Chat History"" link navigates to /dashboard/history
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Click Chat History in sidebar
Expected Result: Browser navigates to /dashboard/history; Chat History item becomes active

Test Title: Sidebar ""Settings"" link navigates to /dashboard/settings
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Click Settings in sidebar
Expected Result: Browser navigates to /dashboard/settings; Settings item becomes active

Test Title: Sidebar ""Billing"" link navigates to /dashboard/billing
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Click Billing in sidebar
Expected Result: Browser navigates to /dashboard/billing; Billing item becomes active

Test Title: Sidebar ""Open Chat Hub →"" button navigates to /chat
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Click "Open Chat Hub →" button
Expected Result: Browser navigates to /chat

Test Title: Open Chat Hub →"" button has accent background and is full-width
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe the sidebar footer button
Expected Result: Accent-colored full-width pill button reading ""Open Chat Hub →"" is visible at the bottom of the sidebar

Test Title: Main content shows ""Loading dashboard..."" while usage API call is in-flight
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe content area before API responds
Expected Result: Text ""Loading dashboard..."" is visible in the main content while loading=true

Test Title: Error state shows ""Unable to load usage right now."" when API fails
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Simulate usage API failure
Expected Result: Main content shows ""Unable to load usage right now."" in text2 color; no KPI cards rendered

Test Title: Empty usage fallback shows ""No usage data available yet."" when API returns null
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Simulate API returning null usage
Expected Result: Main content shows ""No usage data available yet."" with no KPI cards

Test Title: Greeting H1 shows ""Good morning {firstName}"" before noon
Test Steps:
1. Log in between midnight and 11:59 AM
2. Navigate to /dashboard
Expected Result: H1 reads ""Good morning {first word of user.name}""

Test Title: Greeting H1 shows ""Good afternoon {firstName}"" at noon and after
Test Steps:
1. Log in at noon or later
2. Navigate to /dashboard
Expected Result: H1 reads ""Good afternoon {first word of user.name}""

Test Title: Greeting uses only the first word of the user's full name
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user with a multi-word name (e.g. Jane Smith)
2. Navigate to /dashboard
Expected Result: H1 shows ""Good morning Jane"" (not ""Good morning Jane Smith"")

Test Title: Subtitle reads ""Here's your NexusAI usage overview""
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe the paragraph below H1
Expected Result: Subtitle text ""Here's your NexusAI usage overview"" is visible in text2 color

Test Title: KPI grid renders 4 stat cards in auto-fit columns
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe the stats section
Expected Result: 4 white bordered cards in auto-fit grid (minmax 180px): Total Requests / Avg Latency / Total Cost / Models Used

Test Title: Total Requests"" card shows totalRequests value formatted with locale separators
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe Total Requests card
Expected Result: Value shows totalRequests from API formatted with toLocaleString() (e.g. ""1

Test Title: Avg Latency"" card shows avgLatency value with ""s"" suffix
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe Avg Latency card
Expected Result: Value reads ""{avgLatency}s""; sublabel reads ""Last 24h""

Test Title: Total Cost"" card shows totalCost formatted to 2 decimal places with $ prefix
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe Total Cost card
Expected Result: Value reads ""${totalCost.toFixed(2)}"" (e.g. ""$3.45""); sublabel reads ""This month""

Test Title: Models Used"" card shows count of topModels entries
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe Models Used card
Expected Result: Value equals the length of usage.topModels array; sublabel reads ""Unique models""

Test Title: Requests — Last 24h"" chart section renders with title
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe the chart panel in the 2-column row
Expected Result: White card with title ""Requests - Last 24h"" and a bar chart area of height 80px

Test Title: 24h bar chart renders one bar per hour (24 bars total)
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe the bar chart
Expected Result: Exactly 24 accent-colored vertical bars are rendered in the chart area

Test Title: Bar heights are proportional to the max value in requests24h
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Compare bar heights to request counts
Expected Result: The tallest bar reaches 100% height; all others scale proportionally (value/maxBar * 100%)

Test Title: Bars have a minimum height of 2px even when value is 0
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe bars with 0 requests
Expected Result: Bars with 0 value still render at minHeight 2px; no bars collapse to invisible

Test Title: Bar opacity increases from left (oldest) to right (most recent)
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Compare bar opacity left to right
Expected Result: Leftmost bars appear more transparent; rightmost bars appear most opaque

Test Title: Chart x-axis labels show ""24h ago"" on the left and ""Now"" on the right
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe labels below the bar chart
Expected Result: 24h ago"" is left-aligned and ""Now"" is right-aligned below the chart"

Test Title: Top Models Used"" panel renders beside the 24h chart
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe the right panel in the 2-column row
Expected Result: White card with title ""Top Models Used"" and model usage rows is rendered

Test Title: Each top model row shows model icon name and request count
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe any row in Top Models Used
Expected Result: Row shows: model icon + model name on the left + ""{N} req"" in text3 on the right

Test Title: Each top model row shows a usage percentage bar
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe the bar below each model row
Expected Result: Accent-colored bar fills width proportional to (model.requests / totalRequests * 100)%

Test Title: Usage percentage bar width is 0% when totalRequests is 0
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard with 0 totalRequests
2. Observe top models bars
Expected Result: All bars render at 0% width; no division-by-zero error occurs

Test Title: Model icon resolves from the catalog model map by model ID
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard
2. Observe model icons in Top Models
Expected Result: Icons shown match the icon field from the catalog for each model ID; unknown IDs render no icon

Expected Result: 4 white bordered cards in auto-fit grid: Open Chat Hub / Browse Models / Build Agent / View History
